name: Super Quantal Mech Beast Lusterrex
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>量</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ラスターレックス
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
Cannot attack unless it has material. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 Effect Monster on the field; negate that face-up monster's effects until the end of this turn. This is a Quick Effect if this card has "Super Quantum White Layer" as material. Once per turn: You can attach 1 "Super Quantum" monster from your hand or field to this card as material.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 7 monsters

This is a Quick Effect if this card has "Super Quantum White Layer" as material. Once per turn: You can attach 1 "Super Quantum" monster from your hand or field to this card as material.
eff:
2 Level 7 monsters

action: Attaches from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
